titleStmt.title: SII 27.332: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 332. (A.R. No. 531 of 1928-29.) MIYYAR, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up in a garden.
This is dated Śaka 1307, Krōdhana, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday. The details are irregular, the tithi corresponding to 1385 A.D., October 5 when the weekday was Thursday.
It registers a gift of land, as sarvamānya, to god Mahādēva of Miyara by Kōṭiseṭi alias Binnāṇi and several others, when Vīra Chennarasa-voḍeya is stated to be ruling the country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu śakavarṣa 1307 neya
krōdhana saṁvatsarada kārttikama su 1 Ādivāradaṁdu śrīmatu Arirāya ga
ṁḍara dāvaṇi husivaraśūla śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara maṟihokkara kāva
rumappa śrīvīra ceṁnarsavoḍeyaru sāṁbrājyavanāḷuvalli kōṭiseṭṭi yā
da biṁnāṇi miyāru sārattūru Ēḷubaḷi kōṭenalliyāda heggeḍe baṁki pā
ḍi kārarāda Areinaṇnasalike Eṁṭu praje muṁtāgi miyaralu vikrāṁta
seṭṭiya baḷiya nōṭada nāraṇa seṭṭi Avaraḷiya vōṇi sāṁtaya taṁma bra
hmadāya nanūṁ brahmiseṭṭiya mūḍaṇa kaṭṭa tilaḍa bayalu paḍeyaṁ be
ṭṭu I bhūmiya catussīme krama mūḍalu miyara mūḍara sīmeya yeḷe Iṁ
paḍuvalu hebbārvvana beṭṭina vōjitanaka teṁkalu darivāṇaṁtāyana beṭṭina
ji Iṁdabaḍagalu miyara vōji tanaka yi bhūmige teṟu siddhāya dukkha
vosage beḍuguḷu modalāgi sarvvamānyaveṁdu śāsanavannikki koṭṭaru yi bhū
mi yoḷaguḷla jalapāṣāṇa nidhinikṣēpa Ēnuḷḷadanu bhōgsi Ā miyara śrīma
hādēvara Amritapaḍige hāne 30 lekkhadalu 40 mūḍe bhattavanu naḍisi Ā nō
ṭada nāraṇanū vōṇi sāṁtayanū taṁma saṁtānaū Ā caṁdrārkka sthāigaḷā
gi bāḷuvaru I sīmeyoḷage Aṭṭuṁtōḍi Ammalati kiṁgoḍa koḍāṁji mo
dalāgi salladu I sīmeyoḷage Arekittavaṁge 500 nere kittavaṁge 1000 Eṁ
baḍaka Ī dharmmavanu pālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyalu 1000 kavileyanu
dānavakoṭṭa phalavaneyduvaru Ī dhammavanaḷidavaru kāśiyalu sūryya gra
haṇadalu 1000 kavileyanu koṁda pāpavaneyduvaru . dāna pālanayōrmma
dhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanā dacyu
taṁ padaṁ . Arasinoppa kaḷaśanātha . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
